name: Chelsey Fanning
description: Chelsey Fanning is a licensed REALTOR® with eXp Realty in Post Falls, Idaho. She specializes in residential real estate for buyers and sellers across North Idaho — from first-time buyers to luxury properties.

services.name: Home Buyer Representation
services.description: Full buyer representation for residential purchases — first-time buyers, move-up, luxury. Includes market analysis, offer strategy, inspection guidance, and closing support.

services.name: Home Seller Representation
services.description: Full listing and seller representation — pricing strategy, professional photography, MLS listing, offer negotiation, and transaction management through closing.

services.name: First-Time Buyer Guidance
services.description: Specialized support for first-time home buyers in North Idaho — pre-approval navigation, education, and patient guidance through every step of the process.

services.name: Relocation Assistance
services.description: Out-of-state buyers relocating to North Idaho. Remote tours, community expertise, timeline coordination, and local market knowledge.

compliance.disclosure: Chelsey Fanning is a licensed REALTOR® with eXp Realty in the state of Idaho. All information deemed reliable but not guaranteed.
